brief.targetAudience: people who want switch from coffee

copyOptions.angle_rationale: Coffee switchers need credible reassurance that a new ritual will deliver — a superlative, ingredient-transparent positioning makes Organica the definitive expert choice rather than just another herbal tea.
copyOptions.visual_description: A single Organica Tulsi Green Tea box is centered on a smooth off-white surface, casting a soft natural drop shadow beneath it. The background transitions seamlessly from a calming sage green at the top to a warm near-white cream at the bottom, creating a clean gradient that frames the product. Studio lighting is soft and even, illuminating the packaging's lime-green label accents and fine typography with crisp, premium clarity.
subheadlines: 100% organic Tulsi & green tea — no jitters, no crash, no compromise.
Clinically studied Tulsi leaf blended with antioxidant-rich green tea leaves.
No artificial additives, no fillers — just pure adaptogenic Tulsi green tea.
